episodes.title: Trafficking Talk 1
episodes.description: Intro to trafficking talk given in Salt Lake City, Ut.

episodes.title: The First Christmas comes to FLDS Community
episodes.description: Mrs. Gingerbread (the one with the puppet) brainstormed & organized a first-ever fun-filled Christmas event for children and parents in the FLDS communities of Hildale, Ut and Colorado City, AZ. Sponsors and others on the organizing committee include Voices for Dignity, Sound Choices Coalition, Lindsay Winebarger, Church for the Nations, MoviesMakeADifference, A Shield and Refuge, Premier Pediatrics, Lindsay Hansen Park, and SafetyNet - as well as Geri Rohbuck, Margaret Cooke, & Clinton Holm worked, hand-in-hand with Leona Bateman, founder of The Girlfriends Club in Short Creek, to create the first community-wide Christmas event in the history of the town. Santa Claus came to town!
